title: PrimoDato | AI-Powered B2B Buyer Intelligence
text: Primo Dato Log in Start free B2B Data Intelligence Find companies that match your ideal customers. Search companies by industry, technology, and buying fit with a cleaner path from vertical context into live search. Start free with 200 credits View pricing 5M+ Companies 2,000+ Technologies 147 Searchable Industries 60+ Featured Verticals 147 Searchable industries Start from the exact vertical you sell into before narrowing by fit and stack. Explore section 60+ Featured verticals Move from industry context into live company search without losing the category signal. Coverage includes companies like Salesforce Snowflake HubSpot Shopify Atlassian ServiceNow Workday Adobe Industry Coverage Coverage built for real vertical workflows PrimoDato is strongest in sectors where generic tools stay shallow. Every vertical includes firmographics plus the systems those teams actually run on day to day. PrimoDato is built for teams who find Apollo and ZoomInfo too broad. Where generic platforms cover everything shallowly, PrimoDato goes deep on Hospitality, Real Estate, Travel, and Entertainment — with real-time enrichment and buying signals tailored to each vertical. Unlike fixed rate tools that charge for data you never use, PrimoDato uses a credit system. Browse unlimited search results for free. Spend credits only when you reveal a company's full profile, contacts, and enriched data. 200 free credits on signup Credits never expire Bulk reveal for large lists Full audit trail of every reveal Credit balance 1,840 remaining Reveal company profile Credits apply Search results: free Exports: 1 credit / record Reveal history logged Purchased credits never expire Pricing Pricing that grows with your pipeline. Switch between monthly and yearly billing. Yearly plans include a 15% discount. Custom volume Dedicated support Account based onboarding Custom integrations Talk to sales All plans include 200 free credits on signup. No credit card required to start. Testimonials Revenue teams move faster when the data is sharper. " PrimoDato's technographic filters changed how we prospect entirely. We can now target companies running specific tools in their stack, so we avoid cold outreach to accounts that will never convert. " AP Aisha Patel Head of Sales, Sproutly " I went from zero to a list of 30 highly qualified accounts in under 25 minutes. For a two person sales team, that kind of speed is not a nice to have. It is everything. " ML Marcus Lin Founder & CEO, Trellis Labs " We'd been burned by bad data before, with bounced emails, wrong titles, and dead phone numbers. PrimoDato is the first tool where the contacts we pull actually work. Our reply rates jumped 34% in the first month. " NO Natalie Okonkwo Growth Lead, Baseloop FAQ Questions revenue teams ask before they switch. How is PrimoDato different from ZoomInfo or Apollo? PrimoDato is built specifically for technographic prospecting. Rather than paying for a massive contact database you'll barely use, you get precise company intelligence about the tools companies use, their scale, and their buying signals. You reveal only the profiles that matter, so you never overpay for data you do not need. What does "reveal" mean and how are credits spent? Browsing search results is always free. When you find a company you want to pursue, you "reveal" their full profile. This unlocks verified contact details, full technographic data, and enriched firmographic fields. 5 credits per company will be deducted to reveal the information. Do credits expire? No. Credit packs you purchase never expire. Subscription credits included with monthly plans reset each billing cycle. How fresh is the data? Technographic data is refreshed weekly from live sources. Firmographic data (revenue bands, employee counts, HQ location) is updated monthly. Every record shows a "last verified" date. Can I try PrimoDato before buying a plan? Yes. Every new account gets 200 free credits on signup, no credit card required. That is enough to reveal 40 full company profiles or export 200 records. Do you cover companies outside the US? Yes. Our database spans 165+ countries with especially strong coverage in the US, India, UK, Germany, Canada, and Australia. You can filter by country, region, or city. Is the data GDPR and CCPA compliant? PrimoDato only collects and surfaces business company data and professional contact information that is publicly available or legitimately sourced. We maintain a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for EU customers and honor all deletion and access requests. See our Privacy Policy and DPA for full details. Can I integrate PrimoDato with my CRM? On the Growth plan and above, you can push exports directly to your CRM via our API. Native integrations for Salesforce and HubSpot are on the roadmap for Q32026. Start finding your best accounts today. Join 500+ revenue teams using PrimoDato to build sharper prospect lists. No credit card required. Free to start. 200 credits on signup. Start with the exact vertical, then narrow by the technologies already shaping the account.
